display.purpose: Hub page titles and hero headings. Used at most once per view.

title.purpose: Section headings, card titles, course names.

body.purpose: Course descriptions and instructional copy. Max 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Section tags and category markers. Uppercase, 11px. Introduces content; never replaces a heading.

shadows.name: ambient-card
shadows.purpose: Default card state. Tinted with forest green.

shadows.name: achievement-depth
shadows.purpose: Badge panels only. Deeper; the one exception to the tinted shadow rule.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Primary easing for hover lifts, entrance animations.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one action per view. Tangerine background, lifts on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #FF5A00; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 14px 28px; border: none; border-radius: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(255, 90, 0, 0.18); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #D94E00; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(255, 90, 0, 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF5A00; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Forest green border and text, transparent background.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: #304642; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 13px 27px; border: 1px solid #304642; border-radius: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(48, 70, 66, 0.06); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF5A00; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Course Card
components.description: Primary content unit. Lifts on hover; no color changes.
components.html:
Inventory

Managing Stock Levels

6 steps · 12 min
components.css: .ds-course-card { background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(48, 70, 66, 0.06), 0 8px 24px rgba(48, 70, 66, 0.08); overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-course-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(48, 70, 66, 0.08), 0 24px 48px rgba(48, 70, 66, 0.12); } .ds-course-card__thumb { height: 140px; background: #d4e5e3; } .ds-course-card__body { padding: 20px 24px 24px; } .ds-course-card__label { display: block; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 1.1px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8A9A97; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-course-card__title { font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.35; color: #304642; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-course-card__meta { font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; color: #8A9A97; margin: 0; }

components.name: Chip — Default
components.description: Static tag or inactive filter chip.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; background: #F0F0F0; color: #8A9A97; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 10px; }

components.name: Chip — Active
components.description: Selected filter chip. Forest green fill.
components.css: .ds-chip-active { display: inline-block; background: #304642; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 10px; }

components.name: Navigation Header
components.description: Top navigation. Card white background with hairline rule, Poppins 500.
components.html:
Inact learn
My LearningCoursesProfile
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; background: #FFFFFF; padding: 0 40px; height: 60px; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(48, 70, 66, 0.06); font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; } .ds-nav__logo { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #304642; letter-spacing: -0.3px; } .ds-nav__logo-accent { color: #FF5A00; } .ds-nav__links { display: flex; gap: 32px; } .ds-nav__link { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #8A9A97; text-decoration: none; padding-bottom: 2px; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; } .ds-nav__link:hover { color: #304642; } .ds-nav__link--active { color: #304642; border-bottom-color: #FF5A00; } .ds-nav__link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF5A00; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 2px; }

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: Segmented progress bar mapping to course structure. Not a continuous fill.
components.css: .ds-progress { display: flex; gap: 4px; height: 6px; } .ds-progress__seg { flex: 1; border-radius: 99px; background: #EBEBEB; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-progress__seg--done { background: #304642; } .ds-progress__seg--active { background: #FF5A00; }

components.name: Achievement Badge — Earned
components.description: Hexagonal earned badge on the inverted achievement panel. Lifts on hover.
components.css: .ds-badge-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 20px; } .ds-badge-hex { width: min(100%, 200px); aspect-ratio: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; filter: drop-shadow(0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.28)); transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), filter 0.3s ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-badge-hex svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; } .ds-badge-wrap--earned .ds-badge-hex:hover { transform: translateY(-7px) scale(1.04); filter: drop-shadow(0 18px 36px rgba(0,0,0,0.38)); } .ds-badge-name { font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.35; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF; width: min(100%, 200px); }

narrative.overview:
Inact Learn is built for operations professionals — inventory managers, procurement leads, supplier coordinators — who already know their domain and turn to this platform to get better at Inact specifically. They are capable adults learning between real tasks. The interface must respect that context: no hand-holding, no noise, no hollow encouragement.

The visual system is structured around a restrained palette — one deep primary, one sharp accent — on clean light surfaces. Depth is tinted and ambient. Motion is minimal and purposeful. Gamification is present but understated: achievements earn their moment through restraint, not animation. The platform should feel like an extension of Inact itself, not a bolted-on third-party LMS.

This system explicitly rejects LinkedIn Learning's dense chrome, Duolingo's looping reward mechanics, and the generic SaaS dashboard template. If any of those patterns appear, they are wrong.
keyCharacteristics: Light surfaces, deep forest green anchoring, tangerine used with discipline
Single font family (Poppins) — hierarchy through weight, not variety
Tinted shadows in forest green, never neutral black
Gamification that feels earned: hexagonal badges, completion certificates, nothing more
Conservative motion: state transitions only, no choreography

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Tangerine Orange occupies ≤10% of any screen. It marks the one thing the user should do next, or the thing that just succeeded. If it appears on more than one element simultaneously, one of those is wrong.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Extreme Rule
rules.body: #000 and #fff are prohibited. Text is forest green or its alpha variants on light surfaces. Backgrounds are off-white or warmer. Grays carry the sage undertone — never neutral RGB.

rules.name: The Tinted Shadow Rule
rules.body: All shadows use rgba(48, 70, 66, ...) — forest green, not black. If a shadow looks gray, it's using the wrong base color.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadow is a response to interaction (hover) or structural necessity. A static surface with a visible shadow is almost always wrong.

rules.name: The Weight-Over-Size Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is first expressed through weight (300 → 700), then size. Reaching for a larger size before exhausting weight contrast produces visual inflation.

rules.name: The Label Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Label style (11px uppercase) appears for introduction and categorization only. Never body copy or button labels. Below 11px is forbidden.

dos: Do reserve Tangerine (#FF5A00) for exactly one primary action per view.
Do tint every shadow with forest green — rgba(48, 70, 66, ...). If it looks gray, it's wrong.
Do express hierarchy through Poppins weight contrast (300/400 → 600/700) before increasing font size.
Do let the achievement panel invert to forest green — it earns the visual separation.
Do use translateY lifts on interactive cards. The surface moves; nothing else changes.
Do use Label style (11px, 600, uppercase, 1.1px tracking) to introduce sections only.
Do keep body copy line length at 65–75ch.
donts: Don't replicate LinkedIn Learning's dense chrome: stacked navigation layers, heavy borders, breadcrumbs + sidebar + topbar all visible simultaneously.
Don't add Duolingo-style gamification: streaks, confetti, progress notifications mid-task, looping reward animations.
Don't use generic SaaS dashboard templates: big number, small label, gradient accent card.
Don't use pure black (#000) or pure white (#fff) anywhere.
Don't put Tangerine on decorative elements, secondary hover states, backgrounds, or icons.
Don't introduce a second accent color. For more range, use opacity variants of forest green.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, padding, margin). Animate transform and opacity only.
